title: acmella sodiroi
intro: Acmella sodiroi, also known as Sensitive Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Acmella sodiroi include reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and providing antioxidant properties that help protect the body from free radicals. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or oil, and is also used in traditional medicine and as a culinary ingredient in some parts of the world.
